web.markdown:
# Cadillac XT5 Trim Levels Overview

December 31st, 2024 by[Bill Cramer Cadillac](https://www.billcramercadillac.com/author/billcramercadillac_author/ "Posts by Bill Cramer Cadillac")

Share this Post:
Share on FacebookShare on Twitter

![2025 Cadillac XT5 lineup in desert](https://dealerinspire-image-library-prod.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/images/qXzjmj7XZm044IX5qJcVXGci5Ai8eQ6fEeQIpHeD.jpg)

Are you shopping around Tallahassee for a Cadillac XT5 SUV? Then, you will need to decide whether you prefer the Cadillac XT5 Luxury, Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury, or Cadillac XT5 Sport trims. Take a moment to learn about the differences between each of these Cadillac XT5 trim levels when it comes to pricing and features. Then, [complete a secure financing application](https://www.billcramercadillac.com/finance/apply-for-financing/) and head to Bill Cramer Cadillac for a test drive in Panama City.

[View Inventory](https://www.billcramercadillac.com/new-vehicles/) [Contact Us](https://www.billcramercadillac.com/contactusform/)

## 2025 Cadillac XT5 Trim Levels: MSRP & Highlights

You will find feature highlights and MSRPs for each of the three XT5 trims that are available for the 2025 model year below. Please review them at your convenience, and contact us if you have any questions.

### 2025 Cadillac XT5 Luxury (FWD/AWD): $44,295\*

First up among the Cadillac XT5 trim levels is the Cadillac XT5 Luxury trim. This option offers Marianna drivers with top-shelf features like a turbocharged engine, Bose premium sound system, and automatic emergency braking system right out of the gate. Highlights include:

- 2.0L Turbo 4-cylinder engine
- 18-inch multi-spoke alloy wheels with Bright Silver finish
- Bose® premium eight-speaker system
- Front-wheel drive
- Bright Brushed Aluminum roof rails
- Automatic emergency braking and lane keep assist with lane departure warning
- Front and rear park assist
- Dual-zone automatic climate control with individual climate settings for driver and front passenger

### 2025 Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury (FWD/AWD): $50,595\*

Step up to the Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury, and you will enjoy the addition of a far more dynamic sound system with 14 speakers, as well as wireless phone charging, and more. Let us take a look at some highlights:

- All Luxury standard features, plus:
- 20-inch six-split spoke alloy wheels with Polished/Android finish
- Bose Performance Series 14-speaker system with Cadillac speaker grille pattern
- Memory Package with two “presets” for power driver seat, outside mirrors, and power tilt and telescoping steering column
- Wireless phone charging
- Hands-free power liftgate with programmable memory height and Cadillac-branded projection light
- Illuminating door handles
- Leather seating surfaces with mini-perforated inserts
- Side blind zone alert and rear cross-traffic alert

### 2025 Cadillac XT5 Sport (AWD): $57,195\*

The ultimate option among the Cadillac XT5 trim levels, the Sport comes equipped with a standard V6 engine, wheel upgrades, sport-tuned brakes, performance-enhanced drivetrain, and more. Standout features are as follows:

- All Luxury and Premium Luxury features, plus:
- 3.6L V6 engine
- Standard AWD
- 20-inch 12-spoke alloy wheels with Pearl Nickel finish
- Twin clutch sport control all-wheel drive
- Brembo® Performance front brakes and front and rear red-painted calipers
- Gloss Black roof rails

## Test-Drive Cadillac XT5 Trim Levels Near Destin

The best way to compare the Cadillac XT5 Luxury, Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury, and Cadillac XT5 Sport is to test-drive them all at our Panama City showroom. Simply head over to experience the XT5 trims in action. If you have any questions, call Bill Cramer Cadillac at **(850) 387-4030**. But before you head out, read our overview of the 2025 Cadillac XT5 exterior features and Cadillac XT5 engine specs.

Posted in [Model Features](https://www.billcramercadillac.com/category/model-features/)

web.markdown:
# 2026 Cadillac XT5 Overview

![2026 Blue Cadillac XT5](https://dealerinspire-image-library-prod.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/images/IqpRVEzowTjK6QB9GrjkDu5McbUbApuIbN8rOmjV.jpg)

Experience refined driving dynamics and luxurious craftsmanship when you upgrade to a new Cadillac XT5 at Star Cadillac. From the turbocharged base engine to the streamlined exterior design, this mid-size SUV will transform your daily drives in Allentown. Read our model overview below to discover more details about what awaits you in [the 2026 Cadillac XT5.](https://www.starcadillac.com/new-vehicles/xt5/)

[View New Cadillac XT5 Inventory](https://www.starcadillac.com/new-vehicles/xt5/) [Contact Us](https://www.starcadillac.com/contactusform/)

## Cadillac XT5 SUV Trim Levels

You will encounter a versatile array of 2026 Cadillac XT5 trim levels in our inventory at Star Cadillac. Each trim caters to a unique driver, ensuring you will find one that feels tailored for your driving needs in Lehigh Valley. The latest Cadillac XT5 SUV lineup includes:

- **2026 Cadillac XT5 Luxury:** The base trim offers exceptional value, with sought-after features such as a turbocharged engine, Bose Premium audio system, and dual-zone automatic climate control.
- **2026 Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury:** The mid-range trim offers attractive upgrades, including a Bose Performance Series audio system, leather seating surfaces, and driver memory settings.
- **2026 Cadillac XT5 Sport:** Built for performance enthusiasts, the top-tier trim features a V6 engine upgrade and ultra-sleek exterior accents.

To inquire about our new Cadillac XT5 prices, please reach out to our finance center, and we will gladly assist you.

## Cadillac XT5 SUV Features

You may never want to leave your Cadillac XT5 interior, as this luxury SUV boasts a wealth of opulent features. Take a look at some of the highlights that are standard or available, depending on the trim level you bring home to Lansdale:

### Standard

- Heated front seats
- Dual-zone automatic climate control with individual climate settings for driver and front passenger
- 8-way power driver and 6-way power front passenger seat adjusters
- Wireless Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto™
- Bose Premium 8-speaker system
- And more

### Available

- Memory Package with 2 “presets” for power driver seat, outside mirrors, and power tilt and telescoping steering column
- Wireless phone charging
- Leather seating surfaces with mini-perforated inserts
- Head-Up Display
- Bose Performance Series 14-speaker system with Cadillac speaker grille pattern
- And more

## Is The Cadillac XT5 Smaller Than The Cadillac XT6?

Yes, the Cadillac XT5 is a 2-row SUV seating 5 passengers, while the Cadillac XT6 is a 3-row SUV seating 7 passengers. You can compare the XT5 vs. XT6 in more detail at our Cadillac dealership in Quakertown.

## Get A Closer Look At The Cadillac XT5 With Star Cadillac

Do you love everything you have learned so far about the [new Cadillac XT5](https://www.starcadillac.com/new-vehicles/xt5/)? [Value your trade online](https://www.starcadillac.com/edmunds-trade-in/) to help streamline your luxury SUV upgrade, then make your way to Quakertown to experience this upscale model in person and take the final steps to secure the keys. Our Cadillac team is excited to work with you.

[Search](https://www.starcadillac.com/cadillac-research/2026-cadillac-xt5-overview/#ab-modal--vehicle-search) [Contact](https://www.starcadillac.com/cadillac-research/2026-cadillac-xt5-overview/#ab-modal--contactUs)
